name: Simple Roasted Chickpea Snack
instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). 2. Whisk the olive oil, ground cumin, garlic powder, chili powder, sea salt, black pepper, and crushed red pepper together in a small bowl. 3. Add the chickpeas and toss to coat. 4. Spread in a single layer on a baking sheet. 5. Roast in the preheated oven, stirring occasionally, until nicely browned and slightly crispy, about 45 minutes.
simpleInstructions: 1. Preheat oven. 2. Mix oil and spices. 3. Coat chickpeas. 4. Spread on sheet. 5. Roast until crispy.
